title: UI adjustment: I want to replay an AI response with a different model
description:
I added a dropdown menu to select different AI models and a replay button in the `FeedbackPanel` component. Here's a summary of the changes:

- **Model Selection Dropdown**: Users can choose an AI model from a dropdown.
- **Replay Button**: Clicking the "Replay with selected model" button will trigger an alert (this should be replaced with actual replay logic).

These changes provide a UI for replaying AI responses with different models. You can now integrate the actual functionality to replace the alert with real behavior.
